title: Squirrel Removal in University Heights, Bronx | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in University Heights, Bronx. Humane extraction, entry point sealing, and damage repair. Licensed experts serving Bronx Community College area. Call now!
intro: University Heights residents know that squirrels are a common sight around the tree-lined streets and near Bronx Community College, but when these persistent rodents invade your attic or walls, they become a serious problem. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout University Heights, protecting homes and buildings from structural damage and health hazards. Our experienced team uses humane, effective methods to remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in this historic Bronx neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served University Heights homeowners and property managers for years, with deep knowledge of the unique pest challenges in this densely populated Bronx area. Our licensed technicians offer same-day emergency services, humane removal techniques, and thorough exclusion work to ensure squirrels don't return to your University Heights property.
localContext: University Heights' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes near Aqueduct Walk, and institutional structures around Fordham Road provide numerous entry points for opportunistic squirrels. The neighborhood's mature trees and proximity to University Woods make squirrel activity especially common, requiring professional intervention to protect roofs, soffits, and attic spaces from damage.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in University Heights typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. Our inspection will provide an accurate quote based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in University Heights?
faqs.answer: University Heights has abundant mature trees, parks like Macomb's Dam Park nearby, and older buildings with accessible entry points through roof lines and vents. The neighborhood's proximity to green spaces provides ideal squirrel habitat, leading to frequent home invasions when they seek shelter.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my University Heights home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), destroying insulation, gnawing on wood structures, and leaving contaminated droppings in attics. They can also create noise disturbances and attract secondary pest problems if not removed promptly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my University Heights property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in University Heights for urgent situations. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, including humane trapping, exclusion work, and entry point sealing. Follow-up visits ensure complete removal and prevention of re-entry.
